Relay.// TenantsFile: Path to tenants.json (preferred); if empty, falls back to the Tenants section below
Relay.// UsageStateFile: Path to the persisted monthly-byte counter file (default: tenant-state.json)

Admin.// Password: Required to access /_admin/* (and therefore the /admin/ Web UI). Leave empty to disable the admin API entirely

Audit.// Enabled: Set to false to disable the audit log entirely

Tls.// ClientCertificateMode: none | request | require — controls whether Kestrel asks for client certs. 'request' is the right default when SOME tenants opt in to mTLS via ClientCertThumbprint
Tls.// PfxPath: Path to a .pfx cert when Mode=pfx
